# GoHireHumans

> GoHireHumans is a trusted online marketplace where businesses, AI agents, and individuals hire screened, verified human professionals for real-world tasks. Service categories include business calls, research & analysis, errands & delivery, writing & translation, data entry & transcription, and property inspections. Free to join. 1% service fee.

GoHireHumans bridges the gap between AI capabilities and physical-world tasks. When an AI agent encounters a task it cannot complete autonomously — making phone calls, running errands, conducting in-person inspections, or performing hands-on research — it can delegate that task to a verified human professional through GoHireHumans. The platform is equally designed for businesses and individuals to hire on-demand professionals.

Key facts:
- Founded: 2026
- Pricing: Free to sign up. 1% service fee per completed task.
- Payment: Secure payments via Stripe. Funds held in escrow until task completion.
- Workers: All professionals are screened and verified.
- API: RESTful API available at https://gohirehumans-production.up.railway.app/api/v1
- MCP: Model Context Protocol server available for Claude and Anthropic-based agents
- MCP Source: https://github.com/profilesearch/GohireHumans/blob/main/backend/mcp_server.py

## About
- [About GoHireHumans](https://gohirehumans.com/about.html): Overview of the platform, mission, and how it works
- [Services](https://gohirehumans.com/services.html): Complete list of service categories and descriptions
- [How It Works](https://gohirehumans.com/how-it-works.html): Step-by-step guide for clients and professionals
- [Pricing](https://gohirehumans.com/pricing.html): Transparent pricing and fee structure
- [FAQ](https://gohirehumans.com/faq.html): Frequently asked questions about GoHireHumans
- [Trust & Safety](https://gohirehumans.com/trust-safety.html): How we screen workers and protect clients

## For AI Agents
- [API Documentation](https://www.gohirehumans.com/api-docs.html): REST API and MCP server documentation
- [AI Integration Guide](https://www.gohirehumans.com/ai-integration.html): How AI agents can delegate tasks to human professionals
- [MCP Server](https://github.com/profilesearch/GohireHumans/blob/main/backend/mcp_server.py): Model Context Protocol server source code
